title: Fix: Timezone handling bug
original_text: Fixed timezone handling bug in scheduling. Dates were being displayed in wrong timezone. Implemented proper timezone conversion. Added timezone-aware datetime handling. Updated scheduling logic with timezone support. Result: timezone handling fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix timezone handling in scheduling
expected_body_lines: - Fix dates displayed in wrong timezone
- Update scheduling logic with timezone support
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix timezone handling in scheduling"
